title: Aliens & Time Travel
description: Adds a new dimension with a small storyline themed arround time travel and sci-fi elements
body:
# Disclaimer: This mod is currently in beta, expect bugs
### REQUIRES GECKOLIB ###

Originally i had decided to never upload this mod to public due to it being a personal proyect of mine and feeling like it wasnt particularly well suited for it. After some deliberation i decided to finally push it out for the public eye to see what people think about it.

# Features 
 

This mod adds a new dimension known as the "future" which can be accessed only after completing a set of steps as well as several new mobs, a new trading system, new tools, a new ore and more all themed arround Sci-Fi. elements

 

### The future dimension  

This dimension takes place far into the future where an alien species has invaded and taken over the world with their robotic creations. Thanks to their advanced technology meddling with the fabric of reality itself the minecraft world has all collapsed and fused into one single chaotic dimension sporting biomes from the nether, the end and degaded versions of the overworld biomes.

 

### Progression guide

Since this mod is sort of new i want to add a small progression guide in order to help people understand how to progress in the mod.

 

- Find an Alien village (They are located underground, they can be spotted by their large vents protrudding from under the floor)

- Collect the Core located in the village

- Find a safe spot. Construct defenses and call for an invasion (Its a tower defense minigame centered arround protecting the core)

- Adquire credits from defeating invaders 

- Use credits to trade with the aliens located in the village for a matter manipulator and a charge setting

- Charge the core in the matter manipulator to create a supercharged core

- (Optionally) Buy additional items 

- Locate the time machine (Large structure with a red beacon) & Collect the controler

- Replace the damaged core with the supercharged core. This will immediatly cause an invasion.

- Defeat the invasion, During the invasion mobs will periodically generate fuel cells that can be used to charge the controller to full power.

- Once the controller is fully charged, the invasion will end. 

- Use the controllers to light up the portal and access the future dimension



Once inside the dimension you may optionally confront the final boss

- Locate the laboratory structure

- Progress through the structure until the final boss arena is in view.

- Upon starting the fight. The boss will be invencible and protected by a shield

- Locate the server room structures located within the dimension

- Destroy the power converter located above the beacon. (Be warned: It may explode)

- Once 4 power converters are destroyed (1 per structure) the boss will be vulnerable.


 

# Special Thanks

Special thanks to the team over at MCreator for making this all possible 

 

 

 

 

#  Known issues
- The Laboratory structure may be a bit buggy on multiplayer.



 
If you want to support me, you may donate to my [Buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magythemage) page, any kind of support is welcome but not necesary.
